ideation: This sequence mimics the act of twirling spaghetti onto a fork. It starts with both arms relaxed, then the right arm moves to mimic the twirling motion, while the left arm holds an imaginary plate. The sequence ends with both arms returning to a relaxed state.  The robot's lack of hands will be addressed by using wrist and arm positioning to suggest the action of twirling and holding a plate.

frames.beat: arms rest at sides, ready for pasta
right arm begins to twirl, left holds a plate steady
the forkful of pasta is twirled, then lowered
both arms return to a relaxed, satisfied state
